title: Keep it secret: The dollar’s not safe
summary_full: Contrary to media reports, the Iran war has not prompted markets to flee to the financial sanctuary of the world’s reserve currency. Does this mean the conflict might end soon?
summary_public: Contrary to media reports, the Iran war has not prompted markets to flee to the financial sanctuary of the world’s reserve currency. Does this mean the conflict might end soon?

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: the Iran war has not prompted markets
